v7_lineage_verdict: The public NS frontend map points are not proven to be direct final V7 experiment outputs or derived from final V7 experiment output JSON. The generator script builds the file from public baseline weighted scores and ML3 factor-graph confidence/review layers.

field_meanings.risk_score: Baseline weighted response-priority score copied from public/data/ns_community_risk_scores.json.
field_meanings.risk_band: Absolute display band generated by scripts/build_ns_frontend_triage_cards.py from risk_score thresholds: Critical >= 75, High >= 55, Moderate >= 35, Low otherwise.
field_meanings.confidence_band: Confidence/review layer value from public/data/ns_ml3_factor_graph_posterior_scores.json when available, otherwise baseline confidence.
field_meanings.lat_lon: Community centroid proxy for map display.

band_policy.source_file_band_policy: Absolute bands from generator script thresholds.
band_policy.live_ui_priority_band_policy: Display-only relative triage band may be computed by the UI within the active scenario layer: Critical top 5%, High top 5-20%, Moderate top 20-50%, Low remaining communities. This does not change risk_score.

dynamic_diagnostic_adapter.wind_sensitivity: max(fiona_style_wind_cascade risk_score - normal_baseline risk_score, inland_wind_tree risk_score - normal_baseline risk_score) when those layers exist
dynamic_diagnostic_adapter.rain_sensitivity: coastal_rain_surge risk_score - normal_baseline risk_score when available
dynamic_diagnostic_adapter.coastal_sensitivity: coastal_rain_surge risk_score - normal_baseline risk_score when available
dynamic_diagnostic_adapter.claim_boundary: Dynamic diagnostic score derived from existing precomputed scenario layers; not a trained model update and not outage probability.

limitation_text: Nova Scotia frontend map points are precomputed diagnostic layers derived from public/proxy data and confidence/review artifacts. They are not proven direct final V7 experiment outputs. StormGrid V7 ranks response priority. It does not predict outage probability, household impact, pole failure, feeder failure, or restoration time. No production readiness is claimed.
safe_ui_label: Nova Scotia V7 diagnostic overview uses precomputed community diagnostic layers derived from public/proxy data and V7 experiment context.
safe_claim: StormGrid V7 is presented as community storm-response priority ranking only. The NS overview is a precomputed diagnostic layer, not a live V7 prediction and not outage probability.
